query:
SELECT * FROM (
      SELECT toDate(month) AS date, 'New'         AS label, new_users         AS value, active_users AS active FROM dbt.api_execution_gnosis_app_active_users_incl_gpay_monthly
      UNION ALL SELECT toDate(month), 'Returning',   returning_users,   active_users FROM dbt.api_execution_gnosis_app_active_users_incl_gpay_monthly
      UNION ALL SELECT toDate(month), 'Reactivated', reactivated_users, active_users FROM dbt.api_execution_gnosis_app_active_users_incl_gpay_monthly
    )
    ORDER BY date ASC, label ASC
